mapper.select: SELECT user_id, topic_name, created_at FROM notification_subscriptions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_subscriptions (user_id, topic_name) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicName}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, topic_name) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notification_subscriptions WHERE topic_name = #{topicName} AND user_id = #{userId}
